narrative_beat: Close-up extremo olho humano com pixel de videogame na pupila

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: an extreme close-up of a human eye wide open, the iris in rich amber-brown tones, with a tiny vintage videogame pixel art character reflected in the pupil, and a single golden teardrop forming at the lower eyelid
subject.focal_point: the pixel art reflection in the pupil center
subject.secondary: Eyelashes catching warm light. Dark room visible in iris reflection.

environment.location: a dark room, face lit only by screen

composition.foreground: eye iris in vivid amber-gold tones
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white reflected dark room in iris

lighting.key_light: warm screen glow illuminating the eye from front

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: consciousness captured, humanity reduced to a screen

symbolism.primary: the brain connected to a joystick — the eye reflects the game
symbolism.secondary: golden tear as the soul weeping at its own captivity

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
